sections.question_synthetic: This is an internal memorandum regarding procedural changes for handling appeals of fines for late-filed statements of economic interest, not a response to a legal question.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an internal procedural memorandum, not an advice letter responding to a legal question. Document is heavily degraded with OCR errors and missing text. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present. Extracted procedural details regarding appeal submission and commission review process.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: This is an internal memorandum regarding procedural changes for handling appeals of fines for late-filed statements of economic interest, not a response to a legal question.

embedding.summary: Internal FPPC memorandum dated March 14, 1978 from Hickey Bennett to Gina and Ali describing a new procedure for handling appeals of fines for late-filed economic interest statements, effective after a March 7, 1978 Commission meeting.
